meta.title: The Use of Tris-HCl Buffer for Inoculation of Tomato Protoplasts with Tobacco Mosaic Virus

abstractHtml: When tris-HCL was used as the buffer for inoculation of tomato protoplasts with tobacco mosaic virus, a greater proportion became infected than when phosphate was used. Using 0.05 M-tris-HCl buffer, pH 8.0, in the presence of poly-L-ornithine or poly-D-lysine, 50 to 80% infection was obtained.
